## Checklist

- [ ] Backend builds successfully (`./mvnw clean package`)
- [ ] Backend tests were run, or skipping them is explained above
- [ ] Frontend builds successfully (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Documentation updated where necessary (`README.md`, `INSTALLATION.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `SECURITY.md`, or `docs/`)
- [ ] No unrelated changes are included
- [ ] Architecture boundaries are preserved
- [ ] If the analysis pipeline was modified, AI Review remains advisory and does not influence the Verdict
